title: Import of VNC connection files
author: mgaugusch
body_snippet:
I got lots of ".vnc" files and would like to import them into mRemoteNG.

## Expected Behavior
When I start the import, "*.vnc" files shall be offered as valid import source. Possibly, drag & drop of such files into a folder in mRemoteNG shall add them there as well.

## Current Behavior
The "*.vnc" files are not recognized at all. 

## Possible Solution
The *.vnc files are simple text files with information like this:
`ConnMethod=tcp`
`ConnTime=2023-01-01T00:00:00.000Z`
`FriendlyNam...

iterations.description: Issue body is empty and the latest comment explicitly requests retesting on current build with reproducible steps before proceeding.
Wontfix: VNC file format is niche (few users export .vnc files) and can be handled by manual connection creation

notes: Feature: import .vnc connection files. Niche import format.
